---
title: "Execution Patterns"
subtitle: "Two-Brain Execution, AODIM, Instruments-vs-Orchestra positioning"
doc-type: subcategory-landing
pillar: substrate
sub-category: execution-patterns
status: scaffold
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# Execution Patterns {.unnumbered}

How UIAO actually *runs* — the distinction between governance and
execution, the identity model under OrgTree, and the strategic framing
that keeps product positioning crisp.

## Leaves

- **S.E.1** Two-Brain Execution (Copilot governs · Execution Substrate executes)
  — ADR-002 *(to author)*
- **S.E.2** AODIM — Attribute-Oriented Directory & Identity Model
- **S.E.3** "Instruments vs. Orchestra" positioning narrative — from Gap Analysis
